stakeholders.name: Head of Operations
stakeholders.role: Executive sponsor; accountable for OBJ-001 and OBJ-002 delivery.
stakeholders.interest: Reduce manual workload and operational risk in settlement processing.

stakeholders.name: Chief Compliance Officer
stakeholders.role: Sign-off authority for audit traceability requirements.
stakeholders.interest: Ensure regulatory examination readiness and complete audit trails.

stakeholders.name: Operations Team
stakeholders.role: Primary users of the reconciliation workflow; daily operators.
stakeholders.interest: Reduced manual steps, clear exception queues, faster resolution.

stakeholders.name: Front-Office Trading Desk
stakeholders.role: Consumers of real-time settlement status data.
stakeholders.interest: Accurate, timely settlement confirmation to manage exposure.

stakeholders.name: IT Architecture
stakeholders.role: Integration design and system connectivity approvals.
stakeholders.interest: Clean integration patterns, minimal technical debt introduced.
